case_title: THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. DION JOLLEY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,729.00 FILED BY THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT JOLLEY, DION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO /TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOLLEY, DION $729.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $774.50 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-03-2014 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS.-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-04-2015 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-04-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS.-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2014 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-04-2015 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, JPT JEAN MILEFF, CLERK: B.PAREDES, NOT REPORTED (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY JO ANNE ADAMS.-SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
